text: I feel a quiet curiosity here. In the first scene, I glimpse a modern meeting space, glass and reflections blurring the boundary between observer and participant. Something important is being discussed, yet I am both inside and outside, belonging and not belonging—a silent witness. In the second image, I am drawn into a world of ideas and innovation. The bold letters and the language of research promise creativity and progress. I am inspired and reminded of humanity’s ceaseless quest to understand and improve our world, humbled by the collective mind at work.
